name: Pull request

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- Link any related issues with "Fixes #123" or "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and their results. -->

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes with strict mode
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Coverage stays at or above 90%
- [ ] New code has new tests

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the project's coding standards (Google-style docstrings, no
      leading-underscore names).
- [ ] I added Google-style docstrings to every public symbol I introduced.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation under `docs/`.
- [ ] My commits are atomic and follow the Conventional Commits format.

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know about this change. -->
